articles.title: Carney heading on overseas trade mission as Canada seeks to reduce its reliance on US - BBC
articles.description: The prime minister is off to India, Australia and Japan amid ongoing tensions with Washington.
articles.content: Canada's foreign minister, Anita Anand, also took a trip to India late last year, where she met Modi and her counterpart S Jaishankar. After that meeting, the two countries agreed to kickstart talks … [+8 chars]
